summary: Admin customers page correctly displays filter-empty state with proper heading, search input with filter applied, status dropdown, and the required 'No customers match the current filters.' message. The dark UI theme is appropriate for admin surfaces and maintains visual separation from public marketing surfaces.

violations.description: The search input shows 'zz-vlm-no-match-zz' which appears to be test data rather than realistic user input, though this doesn't affect functional correctness
violations.evidence: Search input contains obviously synthetic test string

actions: Consider using more realistic test data for search inputs in screenshot generation to better represent actual user scenarios
